# Getting help with DineKit

| You want to… | Go to |
|---|---|
| Ask "how do I…?" | [Q&A discussions](https://github.com/nikutx/dinekit/discussions/categories/q-a) |
| Request or vote on a feature | [Ideas](https://github.com/nikutx/dinekit/discussions/categories/ideas) — upvote before posting a new one |
| Report a bug | [Issues](https://github.com/nikutx/dinekit/issues) |
| Report a security problem | **Privately** — see [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) |
| Direct support from Web Level Up | [weblevelup.co.uk/dinekit](https://weblevelup.co.uk/dinekit) |
| wordpress.org support forum | [wordpress.org/support/plugin/dinekit](https://wordpress.org/support/plugin/dinekit/) |

Whichever channel you use: include your DineKit + WordPress versions, and never share passwords, Stripe keys, or customer data.
